excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Vision Science and Innovation lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/52049-ftm-ptm Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: All postgraduate students must enrol in the 1-credit subject "Academic Integrity and Ethics" (AIE), which is offered free of charge. Therefore, students enrolled in this programme only pay tuition fees for a total of 30 credits.
